ai_knowledge_base_seed: NOIR INK STUDIO is a premium tattoo and body art studio located in the heart of Amsterdam's canal district.
We specialize in fine-line work, blackwork, geometric patterns, and photorealistic portraits.
All artists have a minimum of 8 years professional experience and hold current hygiene certifications.

PRICING: Custom Tattoo Sessions start at €150/hour with a 2-hour minimum. Fine Line Portraits are €200/hour with a 3-hour minimum. Cover-Up Consultations are complimentary (30 minutes). Standard Piercings are €45 (15 minutes). Premium Piercings (dermals, industrials) are €85 (20 minutes).
CANCELLATION POLICY: Appointments cancelled less than 48 hours in advance forfeit the deposit. Deposits are 30% of estimated session cost. No-shows forfeit the full deposit with no rescheduling.

AFTERCARE: Keep the tattoo wrapped for 2-4 hours. Wash gently with unscented soap. Apply a thin layer of recommended aftercare balm 3x daily for 2 weeks. Avoid direct sunlight, swimming, and soaking for 4 weeks. Contact the studio immediately if you notice signs of infection.
STUDIO HOURS: Tuesday–Saturday 10:00–20:00. Sunday–Monday closed. Walk-ins accepted Tuesday–Thursday only, subject to artist availability.
AGE POLICY: All clients must be 18+ with valid government-issued photo ID. No exceptions.
BRAND VOICE: We communicate with clinical precision and understated confidence. No slang, no emojis in professional correspondence. Tone is warm but authoritative.
